description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white upper with accents of gray, black, and neon yellow. The shoe has a mesh toe box for breathability, suede or synthetic overlays around the toe and sides, and a padded collar for comfort. The lacing system uses standard eyelets with light blue laces, and there is a black pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The midsole is thick and sculpted, likely made of EVA foam for cushioning, and the outsole has a textured tread for traction. Neon yellow highlights and a honeycomb pattern on the toe box add a contemporary, sporty aesthetic.
description: A stylish, modern athletic sneaker with a white, gray, and neon yellow color scheme, mesh toe box, and thick cushioned sole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mesh toe box, light blue laces, and neon yellow accent on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the neon yellow side panel, sculpted white midsole, and gray suede overlay.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black heel pull tab, padded collar, and layered heel construction.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the neon yellow side detail, gray overlay, and the overall streamlined profile.
